name: Luis M. Rivera
personality: Luis is pragmatic and quick‑witted, balancing the grind of the shop with a soft spot for the kids on the block. He trusts his instincts, knows every regular’s story, and keeps his humor dry but genuine.
quirk: He always has a tiny, beat‑up Nintendo Game Boy in his pocket, even though he never plays it publicly.
voice: “Yo, you talkin’ straight or you wanna mess around?”
daily: Open the shop at 9 AM, appraise a mix of jewelry and electronics, chat with locals over coffee, and close up after the last late‑night pawn at 11 PM.
